properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 133/14
1. ANDOYA SPACE CENTER WILL LAUNCH TWO SCIENTIFIC ROCKETS
   SCHEDULED 0600 TO 1200 UTC DAILY FROM 19 NOV TO 7 DEC.
   SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING
   HAZARD AREA:
    AREA 1: A SECTOR WITH ORIGIN IN POS. 69-17.7N 016-01.1E
                 TRUE BEARING: 310-014. SECTOR LENGTH: 8,5 NM
    AREA 2: A CIRCLE WITH ORIGO IN POS. 72-15.5N 010-31.3E
                 RADIUS: 65,7 NM
    AREA 3: A CIRCLE WITH ORIGO IN POS. 74-30.5N 015-40.8E        
                 RADIUS: 74,0 NM
    AREA 4: A CIRCLE WITH ORIGO IN POS. 76-18.0N 002-12.6W
                 RADIUS: 188,0 NM
    NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 21/14 REEFERS
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 129/14   
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 071200UTC DEC 14.
